import json, re

# Load the provided JSON files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

def normalize_arabic(text):
    # Remove diacritics
    diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F]")
    text = diacritics.sub("", text)
    # Normalize alef/hamza forms
    text = re.sub("[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671]", "ا", text)
    text = text.replace("ى", "ي").replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ـ", "")
    # Remove punctuation
    text = re.sub(r"[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]", " ", text)
    # Normalize spaces
    text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
    return text

target_full = "وَإِذَا مَرِضْتُ فَلا رُكُبَ عَلَيَّ وَلا حَمِيَةَ وَأَصْبَحَ بَياضٌ"
target_snip = "وَإِذَا مَ"
norm_target = normalize_arabic(target_full)
norm_snip = normalize_arabic(target_snip)

# Search Quran for verses containing "واذا مرضت"
candidates = []
for v in quran:
    t = v.get("ayah_text","")
    if "وَإِذَا مَرِضْتُ" in t or "واذا مرضت" in normalize_arabic(t):
        candidates.append(t)

candidates[:10], len(candidates)
